message:
refactor(tests): migrate approval tests from tokio::test to runtime_compat

Convert all #[tokio::test] async fn tests in approval.rs to #[test] fn
tests using run_async_test(async { ... }) with runtime_compat::CompatRuntime.

Adds a local run_async_test() helper that builds a current-thread
runtime, consistent with the ongoing tokio::test -> runtime_compat
migration (see commit 44bd1401).

Affected tests: issue_and_consume_allow_once, scope_mismatch_does_not_consume,
max_active_tokens_enforced, expired_token_cannot_be_consumed,
consume_with_context_records_correlation, different_action_fingerprint_prevents_consumption,
and several more.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
